reviews.review_description: Modders everywhere kicking with leaderboard, it’s very laggy and the models are low quality with a unoriginal playstyle. Stolen assets and scripts i don’t recommend

developer_response.body:
No, modders don't kick people through leaderboard. That is a flat out lie. It is laggy, however an unoriginal playstyle is also a lie, considering it's not a flat-out scary baboon ripoff like your game. One dev stole a script by accident, which i take fault for not checking.

You're only upset because you and your friend can't actually hack games, so they weren't able to put an end to this game.

Have a good day!

reviews.review_description: Hi’ this game is so good the jump scare got me and the game was amazing and I wish I can give this game 1900/10 that is how goooood it is and my name is green monkey vr and I am the creator friend.
This game will make your butt hairs curl up from sheer terror. Enter the circus....if you dare...
I'm not biased at all 🤪. Also get rekt everyone, I'm the first to write a review 💅.
